speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: How often...?
questions: Do you always wake up early?
How often do you go to the cinema?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I usually exercise three times a week. Yes, I always wake up at six. I sometimes go to the cinema, maybe once a month.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Your schedule
questions: What do you do in the morning?
What do you do at night?
Are you free on the weekend?
speaking.sampleAnswer: In the morning, I go to work. At night, I usually study until midnight. Yes, I am free on the weekend.
